name: t-linter
displayName: T-Linter - Python Template Strings Highlighter & Linter
description: Syntax highlighting, linting, and type checking for Python template strings (PEP 750). Supports embedded languages in t"" strings.

t-linter.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VSCode and the t-linter language server

t-linter.serverPath.description: Optional path to a t-linter executable. Leave empty to use the bundled binary when available.

t-linter.highlightUntyped.description: Highlight template strings without type annotations

t-linter.format.runRuffPipeline.description: Run Ruff fixAll, import organization, and formatting before t-linter formatting and return one composed edit set.

t-linter.typeChecking.enabled.description: Enable JSON, YAML, TOML interpolation value type checking and TDOM component prop interpolation type checking in typed template strings using Ty, Pyright, or Pyrefly.

t-linter.typeChecking.checker.description: Type checker backend for interpolation value type checking.

t-linter.typeChecking.command.description: Optional path to the selected type checker executable. Leave empty to let t-linter discover it.

t-linter.typeChecking.tyPath.description: Deprecated optional path to a ty executable. Use t-linter.typeChecking.command instead.

t-linter.enableTypeChecking.description: Legacy setting for built-in template language inference. It does not enable interpolation value type checking.
